# Merge PracticeLocation with City to get city names
merged_df = pd.merge(dfs['PracticeLocation'], dfs['City'], on='city_id', how='inner')

# Group by city_name and count practice_location_id
city_counts = merged_df.groupby('city_name')['practice_location_id'].count().reset_index()

# Sort by count descending and then city_name ascending for stability
city_counts = city_counts.sort_values(by=['practice_location_id', 'city_name'], ascending=[False, True])

# Convert to list of [city_name, count]
result = city_counts.values.tolist()

import pandas as pd

# Merge PracticeLocation with City to get city names
merged_df = pd.merge(dfs['PracticeLocation'], dfs['City'], on='city_id', how='inner')

# Group by city_name and count practice_location_id
city_counts = merged_df.groupby('city_name')['practice_location_id'].count().reset_index()

# Sort by count descending and then city_name ascending for stability
city_counts = city_counts.sort_values(by=['practice_location_id', 'city_name'], ascending=[False, True])

# Convert to list of [city_name, count]
result = city_counts.values.tolist()

  ?provider <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-npi-registry/pred/provider_has_specialty> ?specialty .
  ?specialty <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-npi-registry/type/Specialty> .
  ?specialty <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-npi-registry/pred/specialty_name> ?specialtyName .

} GROUP BY ?specialty ORDER BY DESC(?providerCount) LIMIT 10

# Filter specialties that have 'Unknown' in their name
unknown_specialties = dfs['Specialty'][dfs['Specialty']['specialty_name'].str.contains('Unknown', case=False, na=False)]

# Merge with Provider table to count providers per specialty
merged = pd.merge(unknown_specialties, dfs['Provider'], on='specialty_id', how='inner')

# Group by specialty name and count providers
